body.title: Decisions migrate into memory graph (theigors/decisions palace echo)
body.result: Migrated 352 numbered D### decisions from decisions_log.dsb + 3 slug-style decisions (D-palace-source-of-truth, D-workflow-overhaul, D-workshop-evolution) synthesized from ticket backlinks to clan.memories. spawned_tickets list populated per decision. Palace pointers at theigors/decisions/<id>. decisions_log.dsb remains the echo; auto-regen is future T-sync-on-close-not-dayend work.
body.description:
Decisions live in decisions_log.dsb today (plus scattered references). Move canonical storage into the memory graph; the .dsb file becomes a generated chronological echo.

## Proposed shape
- Each decision = memory row: memory_type=REFERENCE or FACTUAL (TBD), parent_id=<decisions-root>, metadata.decision_id=D### with spawned_tickets list, outcome, closed_at, milestone tag
- <decisions-root> under PR_IGORS_PROJECT
- theigors/decisions palace subtree as pointer index
- decisions_log.dsb re-rendered on every /decided close via palace_sync

## Cross-cuts
- T-decision-rollup-on-last-ticket-close reads these
- T-decided-skill writes these
- Two-way ticket↔decision backlinks as metadata lists

## Blocked by
- T-palace-as-source-of-truth (shape lock)
- T-tickets-into-palace-subtree (backlink target must exist first)
